name: Token Footer Injector
description: Automatically appends a token-usage footer to outbound agent messages. The model does not write the footer; the plugin reads the real `usage` object from the llm_output hook and appends a deterministic line during message_sending. 100% hit-rate, 0 model tokens.

contextWarnFormat.description: Extra line appended when context usage exceeds contextWarnThreshold. Same placeholders as `format`.

contextWarnThreshold.description: Percentage (0-100) above which `contextWarnFormat` is appended. Default 50.

modelContextWindows.description: Map of model id → context-window size in tokens. Used for the {max}/{maxK}/{pct} placeholders. Supports exact match and prefix match.

defaultContextWindow.description: Fallback context-window size when the model is not in `modelContextWindows`. Default 128000.

skipAgents.description: Agent IDs to skip. No footer is appended for these agents.

maxMessageLength.description: If set, the final content (original + footer) is hard-capped at this length. The body is trimmed first; the footer is always preserved. Useful for Discord (2000). Default: no cap.

usageTtlMs.description: How long a stashed usage entry is kept before it is considered stale and dropped. Default 60000 (60s).

locale.description: Default language for the built-in format strings when `format` is not set. Default 'en'.
